# vanam-erudite

> A personal blog and portfolio built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Based on the astro-erudite v2 theme.

Developer and open-source enthusiast who builds things, breaks things, and sometimes writes about what they learn along the way.

## Sections

- Blog: Technical articles and tutorials on development, tools, and learning
- Projects: Open-source projects and experiments
- Gallery: Photo collections
- Setup: Hardware and software configuration for development
- About: Background and contact information

## Key Technologies

- Astro 7 with Islands architecture
- Tailwind CSS v4
- shadcn/ui components
- MDX for blog authoring with LaTeX math (KaTeX) support
- Expressive Code for syntax highlighting
- Giscus comment system on blog posts
- Umami analytics

## URLs

- Homepage: https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app

- Gallery: https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/gallery

- About: https://vanam-erudite2.vercel.app/about
